choice: A dependency-free custom SVG component (components/forecast-chart.tsx, ForecastChart) renders filled percentile bands, line series (median/comparison/re-forecast), and point markers (actual snapshots) from {x:year,y:dollars} data, responsive via viewBox, themed to the near-black/maroon palette. No charting library. Shared by Scenario comparison (E4) and the three-layer tracking chart (E5).
rationale: [build-originated] No decision specified a charting library. A hand-rolled SVG keeps the dependency surface minimal and matches the immersive financial-terminal aesthetic (7fb57986) better than a generic library's default look; the band+line+marker model is exactly what the three-layer tracking chart needs.
